apiKeySecret.description: Secret containing the llama.cpp API key in an api-key entry.

contextSize.description: Maximum context size exposed by the server.

cpu.description: CPU request and limit for llama.cpp.

deviceClass.description: DRA DeviceClass used to allocate the Vulkan device.

memory.description: Memory request and limit for llama.cpp.

modelAlias.description: Stable model name accepted by the OpenAI-compatible API.

modelSHA256.description: SHA-256 of the GGUF model file.

modelStorage.description: Ephemeral disk capacity reserved for the downloaded GGUF file.

modelURL.description: Credential-free HTTPS URL for the GGUF model.

namespace.description: Namespace for the ResourceClaimTemplate, Deployment, and Service.

parallel.description: Number of concurrent llama.cpp server slots.

servicePort.description: ClusterIP Service and container HTTP port.

startupTimeoutSeconds.description: Deployment progress deadline including model download and server startup.
